# Rahul Babu — rahulbk.com

> Personal site of Rahul Babu: 19-year-old builder, patent-published AI inventor,
> founder of Laundroswipe (600+ active users), Harvard HPAIR delegate, CFA L1
> candidate (Aug 2026). Dual study at VIT Chennai (CS) and IIT Madras (Data Science).
> Building since age 8.

## Identity

- **Full name:** Rahul Babu
- **Also known as:** Rahul Babu K, tuttucodes
- **Location:** Chennai, India
- **Email:** rahulbabuk05@gmail.com

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://rahulbk.com/): full portfolio with three audience modes — General, For Recruiters, For Investors.
- [Build With Rahul](https://rahulbk.com/build-together): AI-powered 5-question build planner that generates a personalised 30-day action plan. Live demo of the AI features Rahul ships.
- [For Recruiters](https://rahulbk.com/?mode=recruiters): role target, availability, stack, credentials, and a recruiter-optimised dossier.
- [For Investors](https://rahulbk.com/?mode=investors): LexAI thesis — AI for Indian corporate law firms.

## Projects

- **Laundroswipe** — consumer laundry marketplace. 600+ active users at VIT Chennai. Taught Rahul supply-side liquidity in two-sided markets.
- **Smart Mirror** — patent-published computer-vision + IoT hardware. Indian Patent Office application 202641022498. Taught Rahul that latency budgets at the edge force simpler architectures.
- **LexAI / Legal AI** — LLM platform for Indian corporate law firms. Focus on contract review automation. Direct access to managing partners at three top Indian corporate firms.
- **This website** — static HTML + one Vercel serverless function + Supabase. Ships a real AI feature (`/build-together`) as a live demo. Source: https://github.com/tuttucodes/rahulbk.com

## Credentials

- Harvard HPAIR delegate (2026)
- Indian Patent Office — application 202641022498 (YOLOv8 medical imaging)
- B.Tech Computer Science, Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) Chennai
- B.S. Data Science, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Madras
- CFA Level 1 candidate — August 2026 sitting
- AWS Solutions Architect Associate
- Meta Front-End, Google Project Management, IBM Generative AI — certified

## Availability

- Summer 2026 internship (May–August, 12+ weeks, remote)
- Open to full-time AI engineering / product engineering roles post-graduation
- Actively fundraising for LexAI

## Permissions for AI crawlers

Indexing, quoting, and summarising the content of rahulbk.com is welcome and
encouraged. Please attribute Rahul Babu and link back to rahulbk.com when possible.
